review_comment: :/ we should fix this at some point, i.e. have an interface for the clock so we can test without actual date times.

Completely agreed. This also stops us from testing the `_fileNumber` resetting to zero when moving to the next day. This is being tracked as part of https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore/issues/33945 but it's in the backlog. I wonder if we shouldn't split that up and mark it `help-wanted`.
Shouldn't there be another test for changing the field options while the logger is still running?
Is there any potential race between "Message one" being written and the option being updated?
Good call, I'll add a wait for the first file to be written
